title: Friday the Thirteenth
writer: Sidney Gilliat, G.H. Moresby-White, Emlyn Williams
actors: Jessie Matthews, Sonnie Hale, Muriel Aked
plot: It is pouring with rain at one minute to midnight on Friday the thirteenth, and the driver of a London bus is peering through his blurred windshield as his vehicle sails down an empty road. Suddenly, lightning strikes, and a vast ...
